patterns.pattern: Pydantic v2 treats underscore-prefixed class attributes (e.g., _instance) as ModelPrivateAttr. Use ClassVar annotation to keep them as regular class attributes.
Pydantic v2 BaseModel instances are not JSON-serializable with stdlib json.dumps(). Use model.model_dump() or pass default=pydantic_encoder to json.dumps().
Pydantic v2 may not auto-coerce nested dicts from JSONB/DB into model instances in all contexts. Explicit model construction may be needed when reading from databases.
OSMO services can be started locally with --method=dev --host=http://{HOST_IP}:{PORT} to bypass MEK/secret manager. Need Redis and PostgreSQL running first.
Unit tests may not catch Pydantic serialization issues at DB boundaries. Runtime validation with actual services is critical after schema-level library migrations.
